question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the percentages shown on the bars?

options.A: Others accounts for more than 15% of the market.
options.B: The chart does not support comparing shares across categories.
options.C: Others has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.D: Apple and Samsung have nearly identical market shares.

explanation: From the labels, Others has the highest share (76%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Others is largest when relying on visual comparison.
